I DO NOT BELIEVE ANYONE AWARE OF THE FACTS THAT I HAVE DISCLOSED WOULD BELIEVE THAT I COULD NOT BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL. (NO QUESTIONS WERE ASKED OR OBJECTIONS WERE RAISED.) MASTER CALENDAR JURY

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction, Enjoining Deft Fro Holding Himself Out Of Acting As The President Of Yee Shew Yan Benevolent Association, And Directing That Gene W.Y. Yee Shall Serve As The President
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANDREW R. KISLIK, ESQ., 415.762.3100, FOR PLAINTIFF GENE YEE.
HSIAO C. MAO, ESQ., AND JOHN BLACK, ESQ., 415.926.2600, AND GILBERT Y. JAY, ESQ., 415.788.7300, FOR DEFENDANTS DENNIS YEE, EDDIE YEE AND YEE SHEW YAN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. PLAINTIFF GENE YEE'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction, Enjoining DefENDANT FROM Holding Himself Out Of Acting As The President Of Yee Shew Yan Benevolent Association, And Directing That Gene W.Y. Yee Shall Serve As The President IS DENIED. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction, Enjoining Deft Fro Holding Himself Out Of Acting As The President Of Yee Shew Yan Benevolent Association, And Directing That Gene W.Y. Yee Shall Serve As The President
Off Calendar Apr-05-2013 Continued To Apr-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANDREW R. KISLIK, ESQ., 415.762.3100, FOR PLAINTIFF GENE YEE.
MARK C. MAO, ESQ., AND JONATHAN W. BLACK, ESQ., 415.926.7600, AND GILBERT Y. JAY, ESQ., 415.788.7300, FOR DEFENDANTS YEE SHAW YAN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION, EDDIE YEE AND DENNIS YEE.

AFTER CASE CALLED, THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING DISCLOSURE: i KNOW KATHERINE CATLOS AND ANDREW KISLIK. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT MY ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. I DO NOT BELIEVE ANYONE AWARE OF THE FACTS THAT I HAVE DISCLOSED WOULD BELIEVE THAT i COULD NOT BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. THE COURT CONTINUES PLAINTIFF GENE YEE's Motion For Preliminary Injunction, Enjoining Defendant From Holding Himself Out Of Acting As The President Of Yee Shew Yan Benevolent Association, And Directing That Gene W.Y. Yee Shall Serve As The President FOR FURTHER HEARING TO APRIL 12, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. ANY ADDITIONAL DECLARATIONS MUST BE FILED BY APRIL 9, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
